---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd, math, json

df = pd.read_csv('events.csv')

def safe(v):
    return '' if (isinstance(v, float) and math.isnan(v)) else str(v).strip()

events = []
for _, r in df.iterrows():
    events.append({
        'year':    int(r['year']),
        'cat':     safe(r['category']),
        'sub':     safe(r['subcategory']),
        'title':   safe(r['title']),
        'authors': safe(r['authors']),
        'journal': safe(r['journal']),
        'vol':     safe(r['volume_issue_pages']),
        'inst':    safe(r['institution']),
        'pmid':    safe(r['pmid']),
        'desc':    safe(r['description']),
    })

print(f'<script>var EVENTS={json.dumps(events, ensure_ascii=False)};</script>')
```

```{=html}
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html, body {
    height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: #080f1a; color: #e2e8f0;
  }
  #quarto-content, main.content, .page-full,
  #quarto-document-content { padding:0!important; margin:0!important; height:100%!important; }

  /* ── Shell ── */
  #app { display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100vh; }

  /* ── Header ── */
  #hdr {
    flex-shrink:0; height:58px;
    background:#0f172a;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding:0 1.4rem; gap:.9rem;
  }
  #hdr .title { font-size:.93rem; font-weight:700; color:#f1f5f9; white-space:nowrap; }
  #hdr .sep   { width:1px; height:24px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.12); flex-shrink:0; }
  .chip {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; border:none;
    font-size:.71rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;
    transition:opacity .15s;
  }
  .chip .pip { width:7px; height:7px; border-radius:50%; }
  .chip.off  { opacity:.25; }
  #hdr .hint { margin-left:auto; font-size:.67rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,.25); white-space:nowrap; }

  /* ── Scroll area ── */
  #scroll-wrap { flex:1; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  #scroll {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; cursor:grab;
  }
  #scroll:active { cursor:grabbing; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#1e3a5f; border-radius:2px; }

  /* ── Canvas ── */
  #canvas { position:relative; height:100%; min-width:3800px; }

  /* ── Bar ── */
  #bar {
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0a1628 0%,#1e3a5f 40%,#0a1628 100%);
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  }

  /* ── Year labels (big digits) ── */
  .yr {
    position:absolute;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.02em;
    transform:translateX(-50%);
    pointer-events:none; z-index:4;
  }
  .yr.dim    { color:rgba(255,255,255,.07); font-size:20px; }
  .yr.active { color:rgba(255,255,255,.45); font-size:34px; }

  /* ── Per-year group wrapper ── */
  .yr-group {
    position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0;
    width:186px; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:10;
  }

  /* ── Dot on bar ── */
  .dot {
    position:absolute; width:13px; height:13px; border-radius:50%;
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:20; border:2.5px solid #080f1a;
    transition:transform .2s;
  }
  .yr-group:hover .dot { transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1.5); }

  /* ── Connector (vertical line from bar to card stack) ── */
  .conn {
    position:absolute; width:2px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:8; opacity:.35;
  }

  /* ── Card stack containers ── */
  .stack {
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px;
  }
  .stack.above { bottom:0; flex-direction:column-reverse; }
  .stack.below { top:0; }

  /* ── Individual cards ── */
  .ev-card {
    border-radius:9px; padding:7px 10px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
    cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0;
    transition:border-color .15s, filter .15s;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .ev-card:hover { border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.25); filter:brightness(1.15); }

  .ev-card .c-top  { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; margin-bottom:3px; }
  .ev-card .c-emoji{ font-size:13px; line-height:1; flex-shrink:0; }
  .ev-card .c-type { font-size:8.5px; font-weight:700; opacity:.55; letter-spacing:.05em; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .ev-card .c-title{
    font-size:10.5px; font-weight:600; line-height:1.32; color:#fff;
    overflow:hidden; display:-webkit-box;
    -webkit-box-orient:vertical; -webkit-line-clamp:2;
  }
  /* taller cards get one more line */
  .ev-card.tall .c-title { -webkit-line-clamp:3; }

  /* color variants */
  .ev-card.grant     { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a8a,#1d4ed8 140%); }
  .ev-card.pub       { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7f1d1d,#be123c 140%); }
  .ev-card.ramirez   { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b0764,#7c3aed 140%); }
  .ev-card.milestone { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#052e16,#059669 140%); }

  .dot.grant     { background:#3b82f6; }
  .dot.pub       { background:#f43f5e; }
  .dot.ramirez   { background:#a855f7; }
  .dot.milestone { background:#10b981; }

  .conn.grant     { background:#3b82f6; }
  .conn.pub       { background:#f43f5e; }
  .conn.ramirez   { background:#a855f7; }
  .conn.milestone { background:#10b981; }

  /* ── Detail tooltip ── */
  #detail {
    position:fixed; width:270px;
    background:#1e293b; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
    border-radius:11px; padding:14px 16px;
    font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.55; color:#cbd5e1;
    box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.65);
    z-index:1000; pointer-events:none;
    opacity:0; transition:opacity .15s;
  }
  #detail.show { opacity:1; }
  #detail .d-accent { height:3px; border-radius:3px; margin:-14px -16px 11px; border-radius:11px 11px 0 0; }
  #detail .d-title  { font-weight:700; font-size:12.5px; color:#f1f5f9; margin-bottom:6px; line-height:1.3; }
  #detail .d-row    { margin-bottom:4px; font-size:10.5px; }
  #detail .d-label  { opacity:.5; font-size:9.5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; margin-bottom:1px; }
  #detail .d-desc   { margin-top:7px; color:#94a3b8; font-size:11px; line-height:1.5; }
  #detail .d-pmid   { margin-top:6px; font-size:9.5px; opacity:.35; }

  /* ── Nav arrows ── */
  .arrow {
    position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
    width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); font-size:14px;
    cursor:pointer; z-index:400;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    transition:background .2s, color .2s;
  }
  .arrow:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,.14); color:#fff; }
  .arrow.left  { left:8px; }
  .arrow.right { right:8px; }
</style>

<div id="app">
  <div id="hdr">
    <div class="title">HCC Research &mdash; Grants &amp; Key Publications &mdash; Texas 2009&ndash;2025</div>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <button class="chip" id="f-grant"     style="background:#1d4ed8;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('grant')"    ><span class="pip" style="background:#93c5fd"></span>Grants</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-pub"       style="background:#be123c;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('pub')"      ><span class="pip" style="background:#fda4af"></span>Publications</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-ramirez"   style="background:#7c3aed;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('ramirez')"  ><span class="pip" style="background:#c4b5fd"></span>Ramirez Lab</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-milestone" style="background:#059669;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('milestone')" ><span class="pip" style="background:#6ee7b7"></span>Milestones</button>
    <div class="hint">Drag &nbsp;·&nbsp; Hover a card for details &nbsp;·&nbsp; Filter by type</div>
  </div>

  <div id="scroll-wrap">
    <button class="arrow left"  onclick="pan(-420)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="arrow right" onclick="pan(420)">&#8594;</button>
    <div id="scroll">
      <div id="canvas"><div id="bar"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="detail"></div>

<script>
(function () {

  var EMOJI = { grant:'🏆', pub:'📄', ramirez:'🔬', milestone:'🎯' };
  var ACCENT = { grant:'#3b82f6', pub:'#f43f5e', ramirez:'#a855f7', milestone:'#10b981' };

  function typeOf(cat, sub) {
    if (cat === 'Grant')       return 'grant';
    if (cat === 'Milestone')   return 'milestone';
    if (sub === 'Ramirez Lab') return 'ramirez';
    return 'pub';
  }

  /* ── Group events by year ── */
  var byYear = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e) {
    e.type = typeOf(e.cat, e.sub);
    (byYear[e.year] = byYear[e.year] || []).push(e);
  });

  var years = Object.keys(byYear).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});

  /* ── Geometry ── */
  var MIN_YEAR = 2009, SPAN = 16;
  var CANVAS_W = 3800, PAD = 220;
  var USABLE   = CANVAS_W - PAD * 2;
  function xFor(yr) { return PAD + ((yr - MIN_YEAR) / SPAN) * USABLE; }

  /* ── Dominant type for a year (for connector color) ── */
  function dominantType(evs) {
    var cnt = {};
    evs.forEach(function(e){ cnt[e.type] = (cnt[e.type]||0)+1; });
    return Object.keys(cnt).sort(function(a,b){return cnt[b]-cnt[a];})[0];
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    var scroll = document.getElementById('scroll');
    var canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
    var bar    = document.getElementById('bar');
    var H      = scroll.clientHeight;

    var BAR_H  = 60;
    var barTop = Math.round(H * 0.46);
    var barMid = barTop + Math.round(BAR_H / 2);

    bar.style.top    = barTop + 'px';
    bar.style.height = BAR_H  + 'px';

    var CARD_GAP   = 5;
    var CONN_GAP   = 14;      /* gap between bar and nearest card */
    var aboveAvail = barTop - CONN_GAP - 10;      /* px available above bar */
    var belowAvail = H - (barTop + BAR_H) - CONN_GAP - 10;

    /* ── Year labels ── */
    for (var yr = MIN_YEAR; yr <= MIN_YEAR + SPAN; yr++) {
      var lbl = document.createElement('div');
      var active = !!byYear[yr];
      lbl.className = 'yr ' + (active ? 'active' : 'dim');
      lbl.style.cssText = 'left:'+xFor(yr)+'px;top:'+barTop+'px;height:'+BAR_H+'px;';
      lbl.textContent = yr;
      canvas.appendChild(lbl);
    }

    /* ── Render each year group ── */
    years.forEach(function(yr, yi) {
      var evs   = byYear[yr];
      var above = (yi % 2 === 0);
      var x     = xFor(yr);
      var n     = evs.length;
      var dom   = dominantType(evs);
      var avail = above ? aboveAvail : belowAvail;

      /* card height: fill available space */
      var cardH = Math.max(54, Math.floor((avail - (n - 1) * CARD_GAP) / n));

      /* group wrapper */
      var grp = document.createElement('div');
      grp.className = 'yr-group';
      grp.style.left = x + 'px';
      grp.dataset.yr = yr;

      /* dot */
      var dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'dot ' + dom;
      dot.style.top = (barMid - 6) + 'px';
      grp.appendChild(dot);

      /* connector */
      var conn = document.createElement('div');
      conn.className = 'conn ' + dom;
      if (above) {
        var connBot = barTop;
        var stackBot = barTop - CONN_GAP;          /* bottom of stack */
        conn.style.top    = (stackBot) + 'px';
        conn.style.height = (connBot - stackBot) + 'px';
      } else {
        var connTop2 = barTop + BAR_H;
        var stackTop2 = connTop2 + CONN_GAP;
        conn.style.top    = connTop2 + 'px';
        conn.style.height = CONN_GAP + 'px';
      }
      grp.appendChild(conn);

      /* stack container */
      var stack = document.createElement('div');
      stack.className = 'stack ' + (above ? 'above' : 'below');
      if (above) {
        stack.style.bottom = (H - (barTop - CONN_GAP)) + 'px';
        stack.style.top    = '10px';
      } else {
        stack.style.top    = (barTop + BAR_H + CONN_GAP) + 'px';
        stack.style.bottom = '10px';
      }
      grp.appendChild(stack);

      /* cards */
      evs.forEach(function(e) {
        var card = document.createElement('div');
        card.className = 'ev-card ' + e.type + (cardH > 80 ? ' tall' : '');
        card.style.height = cardH + 'px';
        card.dataset.type = e.type;

        card.innerHTML =
          '<div class="c-top">' +
            '<span class="c-emoji">' + EMOJI[e.type] + '</span>' +
            '<span class="c-type">'  + e.cat + '</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="c-title">' + e.title + '</div>';

        card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(ev) { showDetail(e, ev.currentTarget); });
        card.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideDetail);

        stack.appendChild(card);
      });

      canvas.appendChild(grp);
    });

    /* ── Drag scroll ── */
    var isDown=false, sx, sl;
    scroll.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){isDown=true;sx=e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft;sl=scroll.scrollLeft;});
    scroll.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){isDown=false;});
    scroll.addEventListener('mouseup',  function(){isDown=false;});
    scroll.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
      if(!isDown)return; e.preventDefault();
      scroll.scrollLeft=sl-(e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft-sx);
    });
  });

  /* ── Detail tooltip ── */
  var det = document.getElementById('detail');
  function showDetail(e, el) {
    var col = ACCENT[e.type] || '#888';
    var html = '<div class="d-accent" style="background:'+col+'"></div>';
    html += '<div class="d-title">'+EMOJI[e.type]+' '+e.title+'</div>';
    if (e.authors) html += '<div class="d-label">Authors</div><div class="d-row">'+e.authors+'</div>';
    if (e.journal) {
      html += '<div class="d-label">Journal</div><div class="d-row">'+e.journal+(e.vol?' '+e.vol:'')+'</div>';
    }
    if (e.inst)    html += '<div class="d-label">Institution</div><div class="d-row">'+e.inst+'</div>';
    if (e.desc)    html += '<div class="d-desc">'+e.desc+'</div>';
    if (e.pmid)    html += '<div class="d-pmid">PMID '+e.pmid+'</div>';
    det.innerHTML = html;

    var r   = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    var top = r.top;
    var left= r.right + 10;
    if (left + 270 > window.innerWidth) left = r.left - 280;
    if (top + det.offsetHeight > window.innerHeight - 10) top = window.innerHeight - det.offsetHeight - 10;
    det.style.top  = Math.max(10, top) + 'px';
    det.style.left = left + 'px';
    det.classList.add('show');
  }
  function hideDetail() { det.classList.remove('show'); }

  /* ── Filter ── */
  var hidden = {};
  window.toggleFilter = function(type) {
    hidden[type] = !hidden[type];
    document.getElementById('f-'+type).classList.toggle('off', !!hidden[type]);
    document.querySelectorAll('.ev-card[data-type="'+type+'"]').forEach(function(el){
      el.style.display = hidden[type] ? 'none' : '';
    });
  };

  window.pan = function(dx) {
    document.getElementById('scroll').scrollBy({left:dx, behavior:'smooth'});
  };

})();
</script>
```
